name: Waco (United States)

colors.symbolism: the depiction of the Waco Suspension Bridge

description: A red field bearing a stylised white silhouette of the Waco Suspension Bridge — its twin towers and cable spans rendered as the central device.
history: Waco's municipal flag features the historic Waco Suspension Bridge across the Brazos River, the city's defining nineteenth-century landmark.

features.symbolism: The Waco Suspension Bridge over the Brazos River, completed in 1870, is the city's most recognisable landmark; once the longest suspension bridge in Texas, it became the symbol Waco chose for its civic flag.
